title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 514.335 - Guardian ad litem appointed for minors not party to action, compensation
text:
514.335.  Guardian ad litem appointed for minors not party to action, compensation. — In any court case or proceeding in which a guardian ad litem is appointed by the court to safeguard the interests of a minor and in which the minor is not a party, the court may enter judgment in favor of the guardian ad litem allowing reasonable compensation for such guardian ad litem's services.
(L. 1982 S.B. 722 § 1, A.L. 1996 S.B. 869) 
Effective 7-01-97
